summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. Backend 14/14 tests passed. Frontend working with minor issues. WorldOffice structure, Reportes filter, Users, Dashboard KPI all functional. Chat page shows placeholder instead of actual Chat component.

minor.issue: Some old services still have 'nombre' field instead of WorldOffice structure (primer_nombre/primer_apellido). Backend logs show validation errors for these legacy records.

ui_bugs.issue: Chat route (line 157-169) uses placeholder div instead of imported Chat component. Chat.js exists but is not being used.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <tbody>' - React DevTools overlay issue, does not affect functionality

action_items: Fix Chat route in App.js to use the actual Chat component instead of placeholder
Consider migrating remaining legacy services with old 'nombre' field to WorldOffice structure
critical_code_review_comments: Chat.js component exists and is imported but not used in routing - App.js line 157-169 uses inline placeholder
ESLint warnings for missing hook dependencies in Chat.js (loadMensajes) and CrearReporte.js (loadServicios) - not causing runtime errors but should be fixed
WorldOffice structure working correctly - services display full names with primer_nombre, segundo_nombre, primer_apellido, segundo_apellido
seed_data_creation: Created test service with WorldOffice structure (TEST_Carlos Alberto Rodríguez Gómez)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WorldOffice structure migration complete - 20+ services with new structure. Chat API endpoints working (GET /api/chat/usuarios, GET /api/chat/conversaciones) but frontend Chat page shows placeholder. Reportes filter and search working correctly in CrearReporte modal. Hook dependencies warnings exist but not causing runtime errors.

backend: POST /api/auth/login - Login with httpOnly cookies working
GET /api/chat/usuarios - Returns list of users for chat
GET /api/reportes/estadisticas - Returns KPI data with resumen.total_reportes
GET /api/services/stats - Returns service statistics by estado
GET /api/services - Returns services with WorldOffice structure
POST /api/services - Creates service with WorldOffice structure (primer_nombre, primer_apellido)
frontend: Dashboard - KPI stats loading correctly (26 services, 1 report, 6 technicians)
Services - WorldOffice names displaying correctly (e.g., 'TEST_Carlos Alberto Rodríguez Gómez')
Users - Loading 11 users without errors, hook dependencies fix working
Reportes - List page working, shows 1 report
CrearReporte - Modal with search filter and estado filter working correctly
Chat - Shows placeholder 'Próximamente en Fase 7' instead of actual Chat component
Logo - TecnoNacho logo visible in sidebar

bugs_found.issue: Chat route uses inline placeholder instead of imported Chat component
